items.title: WhatsApp still barely makes Meta any money. Can Kunal Shah change that?
items.summary: This week, Meta named Kunal Shah, founder of Indian fintech CRED, as WhatsApp’s new global head, succeeding Will Cathcart after nearly seven years at the helm
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Why Sachin Tendulkar is betting on sportswear built for Indian feet
items.summary: Ten X You was founded to serve everyday athletes, not professionals. The Bengaluru startup is building shoes around Indian foot shapes and taking aim at a growing sportswear mar...

items.title: Anthropic Thinks Its Own Success Is Key to Making AI Safe
items.summary: Anthropic's critics argue it's rapidly accumulating power. The company says that's what responsible AI development looks like.
